summary: Test suite has solid coverage of core requirements (cartesian product, excludes/includes, max-size validation, output format) but is incomplete and would not run as-is. Critical issues: fixture files (config1.json, config2.json, config3.json, config4.json) are referenced throughout test_generate_matrix.bats but never defined or provided; run-tests.sh asserts on workflow outputs (FIXTURE1_COUNT=4, etc.) without clear evidence those outputs are generated. Rigor gaps include missing boundary conditions (matrix size exactly at max, single combo, very small matrices) and edge cases (multiple exclude rules matching same combo, include/exclude interactions). Design is well-organized with clear naming and helper functions, but the integration test harness is complex and depends on exact string matching that appears fragile. Tests would fail immediately on fixture file references. To be functional, fixture definitions must be added to tests/fixtures/ directory.
